text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early on in the new year, Admire Vega and I are
shopping for necessities when...

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Here you are, one bonus raffle ticket! Thanks for
shopping with us!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...A raffle ticket?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!
choice_data_list: This must be part of that sale event going on.
This must be part of that sale event going on.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! You have a ticket! Why not try
your luck?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You could win a trip to a hot spring with
incredible scenery out in the countryside! The
starry sky will be sure to help you relax!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
(It looks like that might have piqued her
interest.)

(It looks like that might have piqued her
interest.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
choice_data_list: Since we're here, why don't we give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a ticket already. It would be a shame to
let it go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's true... It would be a waste.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
All right, ready to give it a try? How about you
do it together? Spin the tumbler with all your
heart!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
All right, ready to give it a try? How about you
do it together? Spin the tumbler with all your
heart!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Heart?
choice_data_list: Let's get that grand prize, Ayabe!
Let's get that grand prize, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait. What does he mean by heart?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe and I spin the lottery machine with extra
oomph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What? The grand prize? Seriously?
choice_data_list: You did it, Ayabe!
You did it, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe Admire Vega's in shock? She stares at the
coupon for some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When she finally starts to speak...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Here... Can you hold on to it?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't really know what I want to
do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Do I really want to go? Or am I just... I don't
know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like seeing a special starry sky doesn't
interest me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If it gets too close to the expiration date, you can
use it however you like.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So—
choice_data_list: I'll hold on to it for you.
I'll hold on to it for you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: I'll wait for you to make your decision.
I'll wait for you to make your decision.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I end up with the coupon for a hot
spring vacation until Admire Vega makes up her
mind.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: First prize...
choice_data_list: So close!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's still pretty lucky.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It feels heavy... I bet it's filling and tastes great.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Should we have it tonight?
choice_data_list: What? You're including me?
What? You're including me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why wouldn't I?
choice_data_list:
That was your raffle ticket, so it should be
yours.

That was your raffle ticket, so it should be
yours.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't normally eat expensive things like this.
choice_data_list:
All the more reason to celebrate your lucky
pull!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before heading back, we pick out some things in
the shopping district.
choice_data_list: First up, some scrumptious hors d'oeuvres.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Are you going to act like this the rest of the
day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy a full-course meal with the hamburger
steak as the main dish.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Carrots... A lot of them...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't even think we could finish them all
ourselves...
choice_data_list: Want to share them with everyone?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Everyone?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! This grated carrot salad sandwich is
fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's seasoned so well and super light! I feel
like I could eat a whole bunch without getting
full!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Would that be okay, though?! I feel like I've
already had a lot!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I'm serving them because I want them all to be
eaten. You can have as many as you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I also owe you for those rice balls...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yay! Then I won't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe, be careful you don't choke...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Ayabe. I'll have some too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This would go great with... coffee. I think I'll have
one too.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Being able to eat with one hand certainly is more
efficient... the nutritional balance of the
ingredients is also on point.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Indeed, I should have no problem
recruiting someone to feed me while I'm in the
middle of my experiments!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Use your own hands, dammit!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow! They're so colorful! Can I have one to eat
while I'm reading?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It's like we've been drawn here by fate! ☆
Brought together by these marvelous
sandwiches! ★☆

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think we invited too many people...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's voice drips with regret, but
looking at her face, she doesn't really seem to
mind.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A single carrot...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry it's not the grand prize.
I'm sorry it's not the grand prize.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's not very easy to get. I suppose this is
better than nothing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's fine... It's a decent prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from the raffle...

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Little Sister)
text_block_list.text: Sob... I'm sorry, Sis...

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Big Sister)
text_block_list.text: You don't have to cry! I forgot too, Aiko!

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Big Sister)
text_block_list.text:
But we can't make curry without a carrot... What
will Mom do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey. Did you say you forgot to buy a carrot?

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Big Sister)
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... yeah. Our mom asked us to go
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Little Sister)
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... It's my fault! I was looking at candy and I forgot to help!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I see... That's admirable of you to reflect on your
mistake.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: As a reward... I'll let you have this carrot.

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Little Sister)
text_block_list.text: Hic... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Young Sisters (Big Sister)
text_block_list.text: What?! A-are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yes. Here, take it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You two get along well. ...Watch out for cars on
the way home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega speaks softly as she hands the
carrot to the two sisters who are still tightly
holding hands.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nothing...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well... That happens sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nothing you can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's her usual unfazed reaction, but I can tell that
she's feeling more down than usual.
